def solve(*args):
    # Assuming args contains the necessary input for the model training and prediction
    if not args:
        return "No input provided"
    
    # Placeholder for model training and prediction logic
    model = train_model(args)  # Assuming train_model is a defined function
    predictions = model.predict(args)  # Assuming model has a predict method
    
    return predictions

def train_model(data):
    # Placeholder for training logic
